ogTitle: Old Cooranga vs Oman Ama: Climate Safety

heading: Old Cooranga vs Oman Ama — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Cooranga, Queensland and Oman Ama, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Cooranga has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Oman Ama (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Cooranga or Oman Ama safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Cooranga has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Oman Ama scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Cooranga scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Oman Ama scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Cooranga or Oman Ama?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Cooranga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
